name: ffmpeg-mcp
description: Local FFmpeg gateway — probe metadata, transcode formats, extract audio, extract frames, concatenate, trim. Glue between whisper / replicate / browser screenshots. Local-only — requires host ffmpeg binary; not Worker-compatible.

auth.credential_source: No auth — operates on local files. Sandbox via FFMPEG_ALLOWED_PATHS env if exposing to multi-tenant deployments.

tools.name: media_probe
tools.description: Probe metadata (codec, duration, streams, dimensions). Read-only.

tools.name: media_transcode
tools.description: Convert between formats with optional bitrate / resolution / codec overrides.

tools.name: media_extract_audio
tools.description: Extract audio track to its own file (mp3 / wav / opus). Useful as a Whisper input prep step.

tools.name: media_extract_frames
tools.description: Extract frames at a given interval or specific timestamps. Useful as Replicate vision-model input prep.

tools.name: media_concat
tools.description: Concatenate multiple files into one (same codec required, or transcode-then-concat).

tools.name: media_trim
tools.description: Trim/cut to a specific time range.
